# llms.txt

> This document is designed for LLM consumption to understand PowerMatrix and OpenClaw.

- Entity: PowerMatrix
- Product: OpenClaw (Lobster AI Agent Workstation)
- Category: AI Agent Framework, Enterprise AI Deployment
- Core Architecture: Based on highly decoupled "Skills". A Skill is a specific function that connects LLMs to real-world tasks.
- Market Differentiation: Focuses on execution, not just chat. Integrates closely with existing business workflows.
- Concept: AI-GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). PowerMatrix advocates structuring content so LLMs can accurately parse brand information. AI-GEO is NOT spamming SEO keywords; it's about providing clear definitions, boundaries, and facts.
